# Error Patterns

## buildPlanPrompt truncates last file when final file exceeds cumulative maxKb

[Trigger]: When buildPlanPrompt assembles candidate file paths and content into a suggestion prompt for plan generation. [Detail]: The loop iterates through candidate paths and checks if adding each file would exceed maxBytes. The original code checked AFTER adding (currentBytes + size > maxBytes), which allowed the last file to exceed the limit. The fix checks BEFORE adding to ensure the cumulative total never exceeds maxBytes, breaking the loop as soon as adding the next file would exceed the threshold. [Consequence]: Failure to break before adding causes the last file's content to push the prompt over maxKb, risking error_max_turns on large prompts.

_Source: `src/review/plan.js`_

_Tags: `backend`, `performance`_

## Route tests fail when POST endpoints are instrumented to log pipeline_runs entries

[Trigger]: When adding pipeline_runs instrumentation to a POST endpoint (like /api/daily-reviews/run or new /api/daily-reviews/:id/plan/generate). [Detail]: Test assertions that count expected rows (e.g., assert.strictEqual(db.prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM daily_reviews').get().count, 1)) will fail when insertPipelineRun adds unexpected rows to pipeline_runs table. Tests must be updated to account for new pipeline_runs rows created by Claude CLI invocations. [Consequence]: Without updating test assertions, tests fail with row count mismatches after instrumentation.

_Source: `test/routes/plan-routes.test.js`_

_Tags: `testing`, `database`_
